scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rovy/core test && pnpm --filter @rovy/networking test && pnpm --filter rovy-transformer test
scripts.build:example: pnpm --filter rovy-transformer build && pnpm --filter @rovy/core build && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game build:place
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build:example && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game test:output && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game test:luau && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game test:place
scripts.build:zombie: pnpm --filter rovy-transformer build && pnpm --filter @rovy/core build && pnpm --filter @rovy/networking build && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game build:place
scripts.test:zombie: pnpm run build:zombie && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game test:output && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game test:luau && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game test:place
